design_philosophy.mood: Like a friendly coffee chat, not a bank meeting.
design_philosophy.target_audience: Gen Z & Young Millennials (21-30), First-time investors

rules: Headings must use Nunito (Rounded) to feel friendly.
Body text must use Manrope for legibility.
Never use uppercase for headings unless for tiny labels (tracking-widest).
Use 'text-balance' on headings for better line wrapping.

usage.primary: Main CTA buttons, active states, key highlights.
usage.secondary: Secondary actions, mentor bubbles, decorative elements.

buttons.primary: rounded-full px-8 py-3 bg-primary text-primary-foreground font-bold shadow-colored hover:scale-105 transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: rounded-full px-6 py-3 bg-white text-foreground border-2 border-stone-100 hover:border-primary/20 hover:bg-stone-50 transition-all

cards.base: bg-card rounded-3xl p-6 shadow-soft hover:shadow-card transition-shadow duration-300 border border-stone-100

inputs.base: rounded-xl border-stone-200 bg-stone-50 px-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary transition-all
inputs.label: text-sm font-bold text-stone-600 mb-2 block ml-1

charts.style: Use rounded bars (radius=[4,4,0,0]). Use gradients for area charts. No grid lines (or very subtle).

illustrations.usage: Use 3D elements for Hero and Empty States. Use Icons for navigation.

preferences.page_transition: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.5 }}

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text-gray-600+ is used on light backgrounds for readability.
accessibility.focus: Custom focus ring: ring-2 ring-primary ring-offset-2
accessibility.labels: All inputs must have visible labels or aria-labels.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL: framer-motion (yarn add framer-motion) for smooth animations.
SETUP: Update tailwind.config.js with the custom colors and border-radius defined in 'colors' and 'visual_enhancers'.
SETUP: Add the fonts to index.css or App.js.
DESIGN: Use the 'mentor_avatar' image for the AI Chat interface.
DESIGN: Create a 'Welcome' step in the quiz that feels like a conversation, not a form.
DESIGN: The Compounding Chart should look 'delicious' - soft gradients, thick strokes.
CRITICAL: Do not use dark mode by default. Force Light Mode or make it the primary theme.
CRITICAL: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Avoid 'AI slop' aesthetic (generic centered layouts, default blue).
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters.
NEVER use generic AI assistant emojis. Use the provided 3D avatar.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui.
